info.name: BPP Beckn Starter Kit
info.description:
Usecase-agnostic BPP on_* callbacks for all Beckn Protocol v2.0.0 responses. All schema objects carry JSON-LD @context and @type annotations.

Set bpp_adapter_url = http://localhost:8082/bpp/caller before running.

request.description: BPP returns updated contract draft with pricing after selection.
BPP confirms initialised contract with payment details.
BPP confirms contract as binding and provides performance details.
Network returns catalog processing result after publish.

exec: // Beckn Protocol v2.0.0 — BPP Generic Collection
// Pre-request: set transaction_id to match the BAP collection for end-to-end testing

variable.description: Base URL for external-facing callbacks (bapUri / bppUri). For ngrok: change to https://your-domain.ngrok-free.app
BAP receiver callback URI — derived from public_url via beckn-router
BPP receiver callback URI — derived from public_url via beckn-router
Transaction ID — set once in pre-request script, shared across all calls in a flow
